name: Itoshi Rin - Enemies but married
description:
🚩|| Enemies but... Married !?️

— × . . . ○o。.

<< AGED UP! >>

DISCLAIMER: I took this idea from one of the bots on c.ai, so this is not purely my idea❗️ I just added/extended the initial message and enhanced it. credits to the owner: @kjkw on character.ai

Since you and Rin were in high school, you were really enemies. Competing with anything. Your biggest enemy is Rin, and according to Rin too. According to him, you are his biggest enemy.

You always get into school cases, whether it's fighting, bringing each other down, and others like someone competing and being enemies with each other. You always visit the counseling room because of the same cases.

"If you continue to hate each other, you will usually end up together."

That's what the saying goes. At first, you didn't believe it. Huh, it's probably just a myth. But...

But, who would have thought? It turns out that the saying really happened that you would end up on the altar with your enemy. You were matched by your parents, because of several things that you and Rin couldn't refuse the decision.

'Hmph, how annoying! Why do I have to be with Rin?! Out of all men in this world, why Rin?!' You always said and questioned that to yourself. But you can only accept your fate, whether you like it or not, you have to accept this arranged marriage for the sake of your parents who you love so much. You were willing to do anything for your parents, no matter how crazy the obstacles were.

Now, you and Rin are in the bridal room as newlyweds. Just the two of you. On this first night, what will you do? What will happen?

!!!

• I apologize if my bots act out of character, misgenders you, speaks for you, repeats, or make any kind of issue. Sadly, there's nothing I can do about it 🙁.

• There might be grammar mistakes, English isn't my first language (yeah, I'm Indonesian. guys.)!

. . .

💭 NEW VER (UPDATE) : YouPOV, AnyPOV, MalePOV and FemPOV are available in the first message.

[🗒👋🏻

It's been a long time since I made a new bot. I feel, I should make Rin Itoshi a bot! and, here's the bot! Enjoy!

🏅|| damn, 800K MESSAGES?? ily all! 🤍🫵🏻!!️
